summary: A Go-based CLI tool featuring a test runner, schema validation, webhook reporting, and MCP integration, heavily utilizing automated agent workflows for test generation.
concerns: Heavy reliance on automated agent-generated test patches may lead to brittle or redundant test suites
Uncommitted changes (11 modified, 1 staged, 1 untracked) indicate a dirty working tree
Proliferation of '*_extra_test.go' files suggests fragmented test organization
suggestions: Consolidate scattered extra test files into their corresponding standard test files to improve maintainability
Commit or stash the current working tree changes to establish a clean baseline
Review agent-generated tests for actual value versus simple coverage inflation
